chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.256 of 2017 Mst. Yasmin Tahir Versus Osman Yasin & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For order son office objection. 2. For hearing of CMA 2430/22 3. For hearing of main case. 2. For hearing of CMA 1351/18 Dated: 26.03.2024 Mr. S. Wajahat Abbas for appellant. Mr. Waseem Iqbal for respondent No.2/DHA. -.-.- Learned counsel for the appellant today has filed a statement along with copy of Memorandum of Understanding between respondent No.1 and the appellant and submits that in view such out of Court settlement he, on instructions, would not press this appeal along with listed applications. Order accordingly. The statement is taken on record. Judge Judge
